# MOSIP Features Page Writing Guidelines

# Features (To compare)

Purpose: Detail functional capabilities organized by user journey with clear value propositions
Features

## Overview
[2-3 paragraphs explaining module's purpose and value proposition]
[Key challenges the module solves]
[Collective benefit summary of all features]

## Core Features

### 1. [Primary User Journey Step]
[Brief description of this step's purpose and value]

#### [Specific Feature Name] → [Optional User Guide Link]
[One-sentence description of what users can accomplish]

- **[Capability 1]**: [What it does] and [why it benefits users]
- **[Capability 2]**: [What it does] and [why it benefits users]  
- **[Capability 3]**: [What it does] and [why it benefits users]

## Advanced Features

### [Technical/Administrative Capabilities]
[Features for power users, administrators, or technical implementers]

## Implementation Guides
[Links to user guides, configuration guides, API documentation]
